com.honeywell.rfidservice.rfid

Class TagReadOption

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.honeywell.rfidservice.rfid.TagReadOption

  • public class TagReadOption
extends java.lang.Object
    Specifies what types of data need to be returned when performing asynchronous mode inventory.
